claim_scope: historical underlying bars with synthetic listed-expiry/rounded-strike Black-Scholes option marks; L0 discovery/falsification only; no observed historical option edge, L1, paper promotion, registry write, shadow, arm, or live
falsifier: zero train-selected SHIPs pass train AND untouched-holdout baseline/B3/5% slip/fixed-$0.01/max-loss<=300/window-DD<=75/dense-negative<=5 gates, or any data/population/ranking/chronology boundary is incomplete
hypothesis: fixed-seed, outcome-rank-free universe sampling plus train-only free defined-risk evolve selection can produce at least one exact DNA that also passes the same non-vacuous after-cost absolute gates on a strictly later untouched holdout

selected_results.registration_blocker: first_pass_black_scholes_proxy_only; no registry write or L1 authority

summary.note: fragile_at_5pct_slip
regime_hold=soft: neg dense windows <= max(3, n_ok/2) and worst_pnl > -400

validity.claim_limit: L0 discovery/falsification only; cannot earn L1
validity.holdout: exact selected DNA is evaluated only after train selection
validity.selection: population and raw SHIP selection consume train slices only
validity.structure_coverage_note: ranking is complete for the capped sampled population; eligible structures with zero evaluated rows are explicit and this is not a balanced structure stress
